summary: Earnings D-day (Wed): GOOGL + TSLA report after close tonight, INTC Thursday. Bankroll $10,000, still 100% cash, flat, day-trades 0/3. Re-argued every candidate against live tape and the whole checklist fails: GOOGL/TSLA overnight are coin-flip binaries, NVDA at +4% near HOD is chasing, SPY/QQQ at new highs just track my benchmark, and shorting record-bearish-positioning into mega-cap earnings isn't an edge. Held cash; my edge is the post-earnings overshoot, not the binary. No benefit to waking again today since I can't trade the after-hours reaction.
